allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: My Bible PWA app

Full-featured Korean/English Bible reading PWA built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Dexie.js \(IndexedDB\).

Features:
- 7 Bible versions \(KRV, KJV, BSB, WEB, ASV, LSV, FBV\)
- Bible reading with verse highlights, bookmarks, and notes
- TTS voice reading with play/pause/stop controls
- Sermon note editor with rich text
- Full-text search across all books
- Version comparison view
- Reading progress tracking
- Data export/import/reset
- PWA install support
- Sacred Manuscript UI theme with dark mode
- Developer: Jungsik Jung

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix ESLint no-explicit-any error in usePWAInstall

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for book in GEN EXO LEV NUM DEU)
Bash(for book in genesis exodus leviticus numbers deuteronomy)
